one_line_verdict: Strong, well-tested demo with sound architecture, but the secure profile as first built could not form a cluster and Part 11 shipped three CQL statements that error live — all now fixed and oracle-confirmed; CONDITIONAL-SHIP pending a live run on the 2.0.6 binary.

surviving_findings.why_it_matters: Secure cluster never forms — the headline Part 11 feature is unrunnable until the cqlshrc fix.
DDM metadata query errors live, undermining the masking demo's credibility.
Inverted masking would teach the wrong redaction to every viewer.
Invalid GRANT grammar errors during the auth-hardening demo.
RF=1 system_auth is fragile on multi-DC; auth flakes under node churn.
sstabledump proof in Module 85 and restore in Module 37 break.

sre.page_at_3am: make up-secure forming only a 1-node cluster because the anonymous healthcheck can't authenticate (fixed via baked cqlshrc; verify live).
sre.confidence: Medium — open profile is solid; secure profile needs a live boot to confirm.

committer.gap_to_A+: Live-run every Part 11 CQL statement against Cassandra 5.0 once the tarball is staged; confirm LIST IDENTITIES replacement and CIDR group insert end-to-end.

security.top_obligation_gap: system_auth must be replicated (make secure-bootstrap) and the CIDR ENFORCE lockout caveat must be honoured before any non-demo use; key material is correctly mounted-not-baked and git-ignored.

must_fix_before_ship: Stage hcd-2.0.6-bin.tar.gz and run make up-secure + make wait to prove the cluster forms
Live-execute the Part 11 CQL battery via cqlsh
strategic: Wire the Oracle's live-cluster checks (cqlsh per-statement) into CI once a runner has Docker
Derive the input-validation regex from TOTAL_MODULES to remove the last manual count site
moonshots: Run the arena as a true 3-family tribunal (Claude prosecutor / GLM defender / Gemini judge) on every PR via a pre-merge hook

unresolved: All Part 11 CQL is verified against Cassandra 5.0 docs/source but not yet executed on a live HCD 2.0 cluster (tarball not staged).
integrated_disposition: The adversarial pass converted a confident-but-flawed delivery into a defensible one: 12 confirmed findings (4 BLOCKER) were fixed and oracle-confirmed, 2 prosecution claims were killed as false positives. Disposition: CONDITIONAL-SHIP — green offline, pending one live boot.
